standouts: The journal treats every repository artifact as a claim and emphasizes interpreting generating functions rather than accepting status claims.

summary_for_embedding: FORMATION_JOURNAL.md is an append-only counterpart-design continuity journal containing Tim's directives, formation protocol, working-model snapshots, tension logs, assessment ledgers, reorganization records, and type-system build notes.
intention_for_embedding: It was used to let future sessions re-enter the same interpretive and operational context while preserving how the project moved from reading claims to restructuring the system.
